category_sources: source_facts.description says it provides GNU Binutils for arm-linux-gnueabihf development.
display_name_sources: Project id brew:arm-linux-gnueabihf-binutils and source_facts.name provide the formula display name.
docs_sources: Official GNU Binutils documentation is hosted by Sourceware, matching source_facts.homepage for GNU Binutils.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has a value, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies GNU Binutils for an ARM cross-development target.
